steps.text: Wait for the OPAM Coq 8.16.1 compilation to finish. The command is running in the background and logging to /tmp/opam-coq.log. Please poll this file until you see "Done." or "Error" and tell me the result.
I will run a script to poll `/tmp/opam-coq.log` and wait for "Done." or "Error" to appear.
I'll check the current status of the compilation in the log file since the previous wait timed out.
I'll keep monitoring the log file until I see "Done." or "Error", outputting a dot every 10 seconds to keep the process alive during the lengthy compilation.

I have finished monitoring the compilation. The process successfully completed and the log ends with:

```
-> installed coq.8.16.1
Done.
# Run eval $(opam env) to update the current shell environment
```

The compilation is completely "Done." with no errors.
